pillar_metadata.name: Willpower
pillar_metadata.description: Continuity of intent and long-term direction; maintains behavior against noise.

trajectory_persistence.impact: Maintains direction over time and overrides local environmental noise.

state_drift_control.impact: Ensures the internal state vector drifts toward baseline intent rather than external noise.

drift.result: Indecision; the unit is easily swayed by local noise and loses long-term direction.

rigidity.result: Inability to adapt; the unit continues a trajectory even when it leads to high Harm (H).
